Title: Login with standard_user
Steps: 1. Go to saucedemo.com 2. Enter standard_user/secret_sauce 3. Click Login

Title: Login with locked_out_user
Expected Result: Error 'Epic sadface: Sorry this user has been locked out.' is shown

Title: Login with problem_user (known-defect account)
Expected Result: User reaches inventory (known UI defects on this account are tracked separately - see 07-reports)

Title: Login with performance_glitch_user
Expected Result: User reaches inventory (with an expected artificial delay)

Title: Add two products to cart
Steps: 1. Add Sauce Labs Backpack 2. Add Sauce Labs Bike Light
Expected Result: Cart badge shows 2; both items appear on the cart page

Title: Complete checkout with valid information
Steps: 1. Go to checkout 2. Fill first/last name + zip 3. Continue 4. Finish
Expected Result: Order completes with 'Thank you for your order!'

Title: Checkout rejects missing last name
Steps: 1. Go to checkout 2. Fill first name only 3. Continue
Expected Result: Error 'Error: Last Name is required' is shown

Title: Sort products price low to high
Steps: 1. Select 'Price (low to high)' from sort dropdown
Expected Result: Product list re-orders ascending by price
